nonBlockingRisks.evidence: All three repos report dirty worktrees via git status; new-api includes source and generated dist changes, opentu includes source/version changes, new2fly includes ops/runbook/gate changes.
nonBlockingRisks.mitigation: Commit or otherwise freeze the exact three worktrees, then rerun the same release gate before release.
nonBlockingRisks.title: Dirty worktrees reduce release reproducibility

nonBlockingRisks.evidence: The full gate completed with exit 0, but go build emitted a read-only module stat-cache warning under the sandboxed HOME/GOMODCACHE.
nonBlockingRisks.mitigation: Run release CI/builds with writable Go cache paths to keep gate output unambiguous.
nonBlockingRisks.title: Go build warning from read-only cache
